subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is none other God but Him, in acknowledgement of His oneness and in recognition of His singleness. And thereafter, verily, We named [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو اقرارا بوحدانیته و اعترافا بفردانیته و بعد انا سمینا
subcodes.subjects: @naming of children; of individuals, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
